raw_consumer_statement: I got an email from XXXX with a confirmation for a charge from a third party for XXXX to a card from CitiBank ending in XXXX. This card was cancelled in XX/XX/2022 for suspicious fraudulent activity. Although I do recognize the merchant, CitiBank customer service representative could not give me an explanation on how a card that was cancelled 3 years ago was processed merely stating that it was a " glitch ''.
